data.title: Daktronics to Ring Nasdaq Stock Market Closing Bell on April 8, 2026
data.description: A bell-ringing ceremony will kick off Daktronics' Investor Day for 2026 on April 9th. This event marks a significant milestone for the company as it gathers investors and stakeholders to discuss the company's future plans and strategies. Daktronics, a leader in the digital display industry, is expected to showcase its financial performance, targets, and growth projections for the upcoming year. Investors and market analysts are eagerly anticipating the event to gain insights into Daktronics' outlook for the future.

data.title: CTIS, Inc. Launches Trial SafetyXchange to Help Pharma Companies Meet Critical FDA E2B(R3) Compliance Deadline
data.description: CTIS, Inc., a company based in Rockville, Maryland, unveiled Trial SafetyXchange, a cloud-based software solution designed for small and mid-size pharmaceutical companies, biotech firms, and contract research organizations (CROs). With over 30 years of experience in Health IT and clinical research informatics, CTIS aims to assist clients in converting Individual Case Safety Report (ICSR) files. The newly launched software-as-a-service (SaaS) tool caters to the needs of the aforementioned industries, offering them a seamless conversion process.

data.title: Award-winning Renters Insurance Provider Lemonade Expands U.S. Footprint with Launch of Renters Insurance in South Carolina
data.description: Lemonade has introduced affordable renters insurance in South Carolina, offering fast and digital coverage for as low as $5 per month. This new option provides accessible protection for renters in the state, allowing them to secure their belongings and property without breaking the bank. This initiative is expected to cater to a wide range of individuals seeking budget-friendly insurance solutions, with the aim of providing financial security and peace of mind at an affordable rate. Lemonade's competitive pricing and user-friendly approach make it a convenient choice for those in need of renters insurance in South Carolina.

data.title: First Merchants Corporation to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: The financial results of First Merchants Corporation (Nasdaq: FRME) for the first quarter of 2026 will be unveiled on April 22, 2026. A subsequent earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for 9:00 a.m. (ET) on April 23, 2026.

data.title: LKQ Corporation to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
data.description: In Antioch, Tennessee, LKQ Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as LKQ, is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30th, 2026.

data.title: Behind the World’s Fastest Growth: OMODA & JAECOO Unveil Third-Anniversary Achievements at the Beijing Auto Show
data.description: Celebrating their third anniversary at the Beijing Auto Show, OMODA & JAECOO are on the verge of reaching nearly 1 million sales across 64 markets. This impressive milestone has been fueled by the success of their SHS hybrid technology and significant growth in Europe.

data.title: Magnum® and Celebrity Nail Artist Naomi Yasuda Transform the Iconic Magnum Ice Cream Bar into a Limited-Edition Nail Collection
data.description: Magnum® is launching a unique limited-edition nail collection in collaboration with Naomi Yasuda, featuring their iconic bars. The collection will be released on April 3 exclusively on MagnumIceCreamNails.com. Limited supplies are available, so act fast to get your hands on this special nail collection.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Conference Call on May 1, 2026
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) revealed plans to disclose its first quarter results for the period ending April 5, 2026, on April 30, after market closure. The company, known for its specialization in technology-driven specialty minerals, will conduct a conference call on May 1 at 11 a.m. Eastern Time (ET) to review and analyze the results. This update was shared via a press release.

data.title: Parraid Welcomes Jaime Ferguson to Leadership Team
data.description: Parraid, LLC based in Hollywood, Maryland, has recently named Jaime Ferguson as their new Director of Product Strategy and Engagement.

data.title: Legal AI startup Harvey introduces 'Spectre' system, anticipates autonomous AI will transform law firms in a few months.
data.description: A legal artificial intelligence startup named Harvey has unveiled its internal agent system called 'Spectre'. The company believes that the rise of autonomous AI will lead law firms to reconsider their approach to staffing, pricing, and hierarchy. This innovation is expected to revolutionize the legal sector by introducing efficient automation. Harvey's disclosure of 'Spectre' marks a significant step towards the future of legal services.

data.title: Full Sail University to Open IBM Cyber Defense Range Powered by AWS and Cloud Range on Campus
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, Full Sail University unveiled plans for the launch of the “Full Sail University IBM Cyber Defense Range powered by AWS and Cloud Range.” The facility is scheduled to open in April 2026 and will provide students in the Cybersecurity Bachelor of Science Completion and Information Technology Bachelor of Science programs with hands-on experience in cybersecurity. Through live exercises, students will engage in cybersecurity attack-and-defense scenarios and practice incident response techniques.
